_provenance: Hand-authored DST fixture. US fall-back 2026: clocks fall from 02:00 EDT to 01:00 EST on 2026-11-01 (first Sunday in November). This fixture verifies that at 15:59 EST on 2026-11-02 (the first post-fall-back weekday), market_state is 'open'. Uses zoneinfo 'America/New_York'. UTC offset is -5 (EST).
